title: theodorea candolleana
intro: Theodorea candolleana, also known as the Sandoricum koetjape, is a tropical tree native to the rainforests of Southeast Asia, belonging to the family Meliaceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Theodorea candolleana include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of the plant often involve using the bark, leaves, or seeds in various forms, including teas, infusions, and decoctions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
